name: Kripalu Center for Yoga and Health
description: Kripalu Center for Yoga and Health is one of the largest yoga and health retreat centers in North America. Located in Stockbridge, Massachusetts, in the Berkshire Hills, it offers programs in yoga, meditation, Ayurveda, creativity, and personal growth. Founded in the tradition of Swami Kripalu, the center hosts hundreds of programs annually and has a professional school for yoga teacher training. The facility sits on the shores of Lake Mahkeenac.
